query: renewable energy latest news headline AP News 2025
answer: In 2025, record solar growth in China and India led to a clean energy surge, surpassing global electricity demand. The International Energy Agency predicted renewables would top coal as the main electricity source by 2025. Solar and wind power increased faster than demand in the first half of 2025.
